title: Introducing Agent Toolkit for AWS
summary: Agent Toolkit for AWS equips AI coding agents with up-to-date AWS documentation, best practices, and guardrails to improve task success rates. It includes agent skills as Markdown runbooks, plugins, and MCP configuration, enabling agents to deploy infrastructure like Lambda functions behind API Gateway with minimal effort.
